info.name: Smart Campus Operations Hub - Backend APIs
info.description: Postman collection for the current backend implementation. It includes dummy payloads and variables for the existing Auth, Users, Notifications, Security Activity, Analytics, Health, Booking, and Ticket endpoints.

request.description: Public health check endpoint.
Starts the Google OAuth flow and returns a redirect.
Registers a new Student, Staff, or Technician account.
Logs in a user with email and password. Save the returned accessToken and refreshToken into the environment.
Exchanges a refresh token for a new access token.
Returns the authenticated user's profile. Uses bearer auth from the collection.
Returns the current user plus the dashboard path and unread notification count.
Revokes the current refresh token and ends the session.
Admin-only user directory.
Updates a user's role using the legacy /users endpoint.
Returns all users for admin management screens.
Promotes or reassigns a user's role.
Locks or archives a user account.
Returns the top booked resources.
Returns a map of hour -> booking count.
Paginated notification feed for the signed-in user.
Returns the unread notification count.
Marks one notification as read.
Marks the user's notification feed as read.
Deletes a single notification for the current user.
Returns the current notification category preferences.
Updates the user's notification category toggles.
Lists the authenticated user's security log entries.
Lists suspicious login events for the current user.
Marks suspicious security events as acknowledged.
